overview: Hyvmind is a collaborative legal knowledge platform where users publish structured legal knowledge graphs from source files or by annotating web content. Features include graph visualization, group chat tied to curations and swarms, a Telegram bridge, AI-powered search, and an MCP server for external AI integrations.
features: Web content annotation — highlight text from any URL to create law and interpretation tokens
ZIP-based source graph import and publish pipeline
2D/3D graph visualization of published knowledge graphs
Group chat at curation and swarm levels
Telegram forum bridge with live polling
MCP server for external AI integrations
8 Google Fonts pairings and 3 size options
Per-user API keys with rate limiting
